fixtures.title: FEMA - 38379 - Aerial of a Texas waterfront community
fixtures.author: Jocelyn Augustino / FEMA
fixtures.semantic_role: INTACT urban block aerial — pre-disaster control showing a coastal Texas waterfront community with homes and roofs largely intact after Hurricane Ike.

fixtures.title: FEMA Aerial view of May 20, 2013 Moore, Oklahoma tornado damage
fixtures.author: Jocelyn Augustino / FEMA
fixtures.semantic_role: DAMAGED structure (major_damage) — overhead aerial of post-EF5 tornado destruction in Moore, OK showing leveled residential blocks and slab-only foundations.

fixtures.title: FEMA - 18203 - Photograph by Mark Wolfe taken on 10-30-2005 in Mississippi (FEMA temporary apartment complex, Long Beach, MS)
fixtures.author: Mark Wolfe / FEMA
fixtures.semantic_role: INTACT urban block aerial — overhead view of a FEMA temporary apartment complex in Long Beach, MS showing organized rows of intact buildings (post-Katrina recovery housing).

fixtures.title: FEMA - 18205 - Photograph by Mark Wolfe taken on 10-30-2005 in Mississippi (FEMA travel trailers at McLeod Park, Hancock County)
fixtures.author: Mark Wolfe / FEMA
fixtures.semantic_role: INTACT building/suburb aerial (negative example) — overhead of FEMA travel-trailer staging area at McLeod Park, Hancock County, MS with surrounding intact tree cover and structures.

fixtures.title: Big forest fire from plane
fixtures.author: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service
fixtures.semantic_role: ACTIVE FIRE with visible orange flames and dense smoke column, captured aerially from a fixed-wing aircraft window above a boreal forest fire (medium intensity).

fixtures.title: Aerial photography of forest fire and smoke
fixtures.author: Reid Laura / U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service
fixtures.semantic_role: SMOKE PLUME aerial — wide overhead view of multiple smoke plumes drifting across forested terrain with no clearly visible open flame (low-intensity smoke-only scene).

fixtures.title: FEMA - 38377 - Aerial of storm surge debris deposit in Texas
fixtures.author: Jocelyn Augustino / FEMA
fixtures.semantic_role: DEBRIS FIELD aerial — overhead of a storm-surge debris deposit (timber, building remnants) piled along a road corridor in Galveston, TX after Hurricane Ike.

fixtures.title: FEMA - 18258 - Photograph by Mark Wolfe taken on 10-30-2005 in Mississippi (Blue roofs across coastal Mississippi after Hurricane Katrina)
fixtures.author: Mark Wolfe / FEMA
fixtures.semantic_role: STATIC AERIAL of a post-event disaster scene — wide overhead of a coastal Mississippi neighborhood after Hurricane Katrina showing widespread blue-tarp roofs (FEMA Operation Blue Roof) signalling roof damage across the entire block grid.
